parameters.query: SELECT MAX(CASE WHEN key = 'n8n_base_url' THEN value END) AS n8n_base_url FROM public.global_settings WHERE key IN ('n8n_base_url');

parameters.jsCode: const settings=$('Load Action Settings').first()?.json??{}; const request=$('Team Management Actions Webhook').first()?.json??$input.first()?.json??{}; const body=request.body??request.query??request; const headers=request.headers??{}; const clean=(value)=>value===null||value===undefined?'':String(value).trim(); const parseId=(value)=>{const n=Number.parseInt(clean(value),10); return Number.isInteger(n)&&n>0?n:null;}; const parseBool=(value)=>['1','true','yes','y','on'].includes(clean(value).toLowerCase()); const deriveBaseUrl=(sourceHeaders,fallback)=>{const forwardedProto=clean(sourceHeaders['x-forwarded-proto']); const forwardedHost=clean(sourceHeaders['x-forwarded-host']); const host=forwardedHost||clean(sourceHeaders.host); const forwardedPort=clean(sourceHeaders['x-forwarded-port']); if(!host) return fallback; const proto=forwardedProto||'http'; let authority=host; if(forwardedPort&&!authority.includes(':')){const isDefault=(proto==='http'&&forwardedPort==='80')||(proto==='https'&&forwardedPort==='443'); if(!isDefault) authority=authority+':'+forwardedPort;} return proto+'://'+authority;}; const fallbackBaseUrl=clean(settings.n8n_base_url)||'http://n8n:5678'; const n8nBaseUrl=deriveBaseUrl(headers,fallbackBaseUrl); const action=clean(body.action); const teamId=parseId(body.team_id); const playerId=parseId(body.player_id); const nicknameId=parseId(body.nickname_id); const overrideId=parseId(body.override_id); const returnUrl=clean(body.return_url)||(n8nBaseUrl+'/webhook/team-management?view=teams'); const payload={action,team_id:teamId,player_id:playerId,nickname_id:nicknameId,override_id:overrideId,section:clean(body.section),team_name:clean(body.team_name),season:clean(body.season),sort_order:Number.parseInt(clean(body.sort_order)||'0',10)||0,source_name:clean(body.source_name),is_captain:parseBool(body.is_captain),source:clean(body.source),target:clean(body.target),notes:clean(body.notes),return_url:returnUrl,n8n_base_url:n8nBaseUrl,error_message:''}; if(action==='create_team'){ if(!payload.section) payload.error_message='Section is required.'; else if(!payload.team_name) payload.error_message='Team name is required.'; else if(!payload.season) payload.error_message='Season is required.'; } else if(action==='update_team'){ if(!payload.team_id) payload.error_message='A valid team is required.'; else if(!payload.section) payload.error_message='Section is required.'; else if(!payload.team_name) payload.error_message='Team name is required.'; else if(!payload.season) payload.error_message='Season is required.'; } else if(action==='delete_team'){ if(!payload.team_id) payload.error_message='A valid team is required.'; } else if(action==='create_player'){ if(!payload.team_id) payload.error_message='A valid team is required.'; else if(!payload.source_name) payload.error_message='Player name is required.'; } else if(action==='update_player'){ if(!payload.player_id) payload.error_message='A valid player is required.'; else if(!payload.team_id) payload.error_message='A valid team is required.'; else if(!payload.source_name) payload.error_message='Player name is required.'; } else if(action==='delete_player'){ if(!payload.player_id) payload.error_message='A valid player is required.'; } else if(action==='create_nickname'){ if(!payload.source) payload.error_message='Source name is required.'; else if(!payload.target) payload.error_message='Target name is required.'; } else if(action==='update_nickname'){ if(!payload.nickname_id) payload.error_message='A valid nickname row is required.'; else if(!payload.source) payload.error_message='Source name is required.'; else if(!payload.target) payload.error_message='Target name is required.'; } else if(action==='delete_nickname'){ if(!payload.nickname_id) payload.error_message='A valid nickname row is required.'; } else if(action==='create_override'){ if(!payload.source) payload.error_message='Source name is required.'; else if(!payload.target) payload.error_message='Target name is required.'; } else if(action==='update_override'){ if(!payload.override_id) payload.error_message='A valid override row is required.'; else if(!payload.source) payload.error_message='Source name is required.'; else if(!payload.target) payload.error_message='Target name is required.'; } else if(action==='delete_override'){ if(!payload.override_id) payload.error_message='A valid override row is required.'; } else { payload.error_message='Unsupported action.'; } return [{json:payload}];

const input=$('Resolve Action Request').first()?.json??{}; const message=input.error_message||'Unable to complete the requested action.'; const redirectTo=(input.return_url||'#')+((input.return_url||'').includes('?')?'&':'?')+'error='+encodeURIComponent(message); const escapeHtml=(value)=>String(value??'').replace(/&/g,'&').replace(//g,'>').replace(/\"/g,'"').replace(/'/g,'''); const html='Action failed

'+escapeHtml(message)+'

Continue

'; return [{json:{html}}];

const input=$input.first().json??{}; const sqlLiteral=(value)=>value===null||value===undefined?'NULL':"'"+String(value).replace(/'/g,"''")+"'"; const intLiteral=(value,fallback='NULL')=>Number.isInteger(value)?String(value):fallback; let sql=''; let successTitle='Saved'; let successMessage='Changes saved.'; if(input.action==='create_team'){ sql=['INSERT INTO public.teams (section, team_name, season, sort_order, updated_at)','VALUES ('+[sqlLiteral(input.section),sqlLiteral(input.team_name),sqlLiteral(input.season),String(input.sort_order||0),'now()'].join(', ')+')','RETURNING id::text AS team_id'].join('
'); successTitle='Team created'; successMessage='Team saved.'; } else if(input.action==='update_team'){ sql=['UPDATE public.teams','SET section = '+sqlLiteral(input.section)+',','    team_name = '+sqlLiteral(input.team_name)+',','    season = '+sqlLiteral(input.season)+',','    sort_order = '+String(input.sort_order||0)+',','    updated_at = now()','WHERE id = '+intLiteral(input.team_id),'RETURNING id::text AS team_id'].join('
'); successTitle='Team updated'; successMessage='Team updated.'; } else if(input.action==='delete_team'){ sql=['WITH deleted AS (','  DELETE FROM public.teams WHERE id = '+intLiteral(input.team_id)+' RETURNING id',')','SELECT COALESCE(MAX(id),0)::text AS team_id FROM deleted'].join('
'); successTitle='Team deleted'; successMessage='Team deleted.'; } else if(input.action==='create_player'){ sql=['INSERT INTO public.team_players (team_id, source_name, is_captain, sort_order, created_at)','VALUES ('+[intLiteral(input.team_id),sqlLiteral(input.source_name),input.is_captain?'TRUE':'FALSE',String(input.sort_order||0),'now()'].join(', ')+')','RETURNING team_id::text AS team_id, id::text AS player_id'].join('
'); successTitle='Player added'; successMessage='Player added to team.'; } else if(input.action==='update_player'){ sql=['UPDATE public.team_players','SET source_name = '+sqlLiteral(input.source_name)+',','    is_captain = '+(input.is_captain?'TRUE':'FALSE')+',','    sort_order = '+String(input.sort_order||0),'WHERE id = '+intLiteral(input.player_id),'RETURNING team_id::text AS team_id, id::text AS player_id'].join('
'); successTitle='Player updated'; successMessage='Team player updated.'; } else if(input.action==='delete_player'){ sql=['WITH deleted AS (','  DELETE FROM public.team_players WHERE id = '+intLiteral(input.player_id)+' RETURNING id, team_id',')','SELECT COALESCE(MAX(team_id),0)::text AS team_id, COALESCE(MAX(id),0)::text AS player_id FROM deleted'].join('
'); successTitle='Player deleted'; successMessage='Team player removed.'; } else if(input.action==='create_nickname'){ sql=['INSERT INTO public.team_nicknames (source, target, notes, created_at, updated_at)','VALUES ('+[sqlLiteral(input.source),sqlLiteral(input.target),sqlLiteral(input.notes||''),'now()','now()'].join(', ')+')','RETURNING id::text AS nickname_id'].join('
'); successTitle='Nickname created'; successMessage='Nickname saved.'; } else if(input.action==='update_nickname'){ sql=['UPDATE public.team_nicknames','SET source = '+sqlLiteral(input.source)+',','    target = '+sqlLiteral(input.target)+',','    notes = '+sqlLiteral(input.notes||'')+',','    updated_at = now()','WHERE id = '+intLiteral(input.nickname_id),'RETURNING id::text AS nickname_id'].join('
'); successTitle='Nickname updated'; successMessage='Nickname updated.'; } else if(input.action==='delete_nickname'){ sql=['WITH deleted AS (','  DELETE FROM public.team_nicknames WHERE id = '+intLiteral(input.nickname_id)+' RETURNING id',')','SELECT COALESCE(MAX(id),0)::text AS nickname_id FROM deleted'].join('
'); successTitle='Nickname deleted'; successMessage='Nickname deleted.'; } else if(input.action==='create_override'){ sql=['INSERT INTO public.team_name_overrides (source, target, created_at)','VALUES ('+[sqlLiteral(input.source),sqlLiteral(input.target),'now()'].join(', ')+')','RETURNING id::text AS override_id'].join('
'); successTitle='Override created'; successMessage='Override saved.'; } else if(input.action==='update_override'){ sql=['UPDATE public.team_name_overrides','SET source = '+sqlLiteral(input.source)+',','    target = '+sqlLiteral(input.target),'WHERE id = '+intLiteral(input.override_id),'RETURNING id::text AS override_id'].join('
'); successTitle='Override updated'; successMessage='Override updated.'; } else if(input.action==='delete_override'){ sql=['WITH deleted AS (','  DELETE FROM public.team_name_overrides WHERE id = '+intLiteral(input.override_id)+' RETURNING id',')','SELECT COALESCE(MAX(id),0)::text AS override_id FROM deleted'].join('
'); successTitle='Override deleted'; successMessage='Override deleted.'; } return [{json:{...input,sql,success_title:successTitle,success_message:successMessage}}];

const input=$('Build Action SQL').first()?.json??{}; const result=$input.first()?.json??{}; const clean=(value)=>value===null||value===undefined?'':String(value).trim(); let redirectTo=input.return_url||(input.n8n_base_url+'/webhook/team-management?view=teams'); if(input.action.includes('_player')){ const teamId=clean(result.team_id)||clean(input.team_id); redirectTo=input.n8n_base_url+'/webhook/team-management?view=players'+(teamId?'&team_id='+encodeURIComponent(teamId):''); } else if(input.action.includes('_nickname')){ redirectTo=input.n8n_base_url+'/webhook/team-management?view=nicknames'; } else if(input.action.includes('_override')){ redirectTo=input.n8n_base_url+'/webhook/team-management?view=overrides'; } else { redirectTo=input.n8n_base_url+'/webhook/team-management?view=teams'; } redirectTo += (redirectTo.includes('?') ? '&' : '?') + 'message=' + encodeURIComponent(input.success_message || 'Saved'); const escapeHtml=(value)=>String(value??'').replace(/&/g,'&').replace(//g,'>').replace(/\"/g,'"').replace(/'/g,'''); const html=''+escapeHtml(input.success_title||'Saved')+'

Saved. Redirecting…

Continue

'; return [{json:{html}}];
